state_manifold.state_type: CAPS_BE state (b,e) with b,e ∈ ℕ and bounded by N
state_manifold.embedding_function: Identity embedding of tuple (b,e); objective defines energy E(s)
constraints: Time is discrete path length (number of generator moves)

generators.name: mu
generators.invariant_effect: Swaps coordinates; preserves domain/caps if inputs do

generators.name: lambda_k
generators.transition_rule: (b,e) → (k·b, k·e) for integer k ≥ 2, if k·b,k·e ≤ N
generators.invariant_effect: Uniform scaling by k; may violate Caps(N,N)

generators.name: nu
generators.transition_rule: (b,e) → (b/2, e/2) if b,e are both even
generators.invariant_effect: Contracts by factor 2 on even-even states; preserves natural domain

invariants.name: NATURAL_DOMAIN
invariants.definition: State must satisfy b,e ∈ ℕ with b,e ≥ 1

invariants.name: CAPS_N
invariants.definition: State must satisfy b,e ≤ N (certificate-provided N with 1 ≤ N ≤ 10)

failure_taxonomy.trigger_condition: schema_version mismatch or JSON schema violation
state_before or state_after violates Caps(N,N): b,e ≤ N
move-specific preconditions fail (e.g., nu requires even-even; lambda_k requires k ≥ 2)
chosen_move is not greedy argmin over attempted legal moves (tie-break by move name and lambda_k:k)
attempted_moves or chosen_move includes a move not listed in generator_set; membership is defined on the pair (name,k) (for lambda_k) and on (name,None) for other generators

reachability.component_analysis: Legal transitions form a finite directed graph over Caps(N,N) states. Optional return_in_k_probes are verified by BFS up to depth k using the declared generator_set (order-preserving compilation, identical moves deduplicated).

determinism_contract.nondeterminism_proof: All move applications are deterministic total functions into (State ∪ Failure). Energy is a deterministic integer function of state. Greedy policy is deterministic via total ordering (energy_after, move_sort_key). Optional reachability probes are deterministic via BFS with fixed generator order.
